case_title: CHRISTIAN DEKKER VS. CLAUDIO PALMA MD ET AL

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST CHRISTIAN DEKKER, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-27-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-12-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
